title: Breaking: Supreme Court Greenlights Alabama Mid-Decade Redistricting
summary:
In a 6-3 shadow docket order, and over a dissent by Justice Sotomayor, the Supreme Court effectively allowed Alabama to re-draw its congressional redistricting map. You can find the order here.

title: Troutman Adds Real Estate Partner Kate Pennartz In Dallas To Strengthen National Platform
summary:
Troutman Pepper Locke has added Kate Pennartz as a partner in its Real Estate Practice Group in Dallas, further strengthening the firm's nationally recognized real estate platform and expanding its capabilities in one of the country's most active development markets. Pennartz joins from Holland & Knight and brings significant experience advising developers, investors and lenders on complex real estate transactions across the full lifecycle of deals.
The post Troutman Adds Real Estate Partner Kate Pennartz In Dallas To Strengthen National Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Spacial: Interview With Co-Founders Maor Greenberg & Ami Avrahami About The AI-Based Engineering Platform
summary:
Spacial is an AI-powered engineering platform that transforms 2D residential architectural drawings into a coordinated set of structural and MEP drawings within days, rather than months. Pulse 2.0 interviewed Spacial co-founder and CEO Maor Greenberg and co-founder and Chief Product Officer Ami Avrahami to learn more.
The post Spacial: Interview With Co-Founders Maor Greenberg & Ami Avrahami About The AI-Based Engineering Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Campbell’s Completes Acquisition Of 49% Interest In La Regina To Advance Rao’s Homemade Growth
summary:
The Campbell's Company has completed the acquisition of a 49% interest in La Regina di San Marzano di Antonio Romano S.p.A. and La Regina Atlantica, LLC, the privately held maker of Rao's Homemade tomato-based jarred pasta sauces. Based in Scafati, Italy and founded by Antonio Romano in 1972, La Regina has been a key production partner of Rao's Homemade since 1993 and produces all of the brand's tomato-based sauces today, with an additional facility in Alma, Georgia. The transaction is expected to be neutral to Campbell's fiscal 2026 adjusted earnings per share.
The post Campbell’s Compl

title: Wingreens World Acquires Safe Harvest To Expand Pesticide-Free Food Movement Across India
summary:
Wingreens World, the parent company of Wingreens Farms and Raw Pressery, has acquired Safe Harvest, one of India's leading pesticide-free food brands built on a foundation of natural farming and direct farmer partnerships. The acquisition brings Safe Harvest founder Rangu Rao and the broader Safe Harvest team into the Wingreens Farms family. Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
The post Wingreens World Acquires Safe Harvest To Expand Pesticide-Free Food Movement Across India appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Macerich Acquires Annapolis Mall For $272 Million
summary: Macerich, a leading owner, operator and developer of major retail properties, has acquired Annapolis Mall, a Class A retail center totaling approximately 1.5 million square feet in Annapolis, Maryland, for $260 million, plus the adjacent 13.1-acre vacant Sears parcel for $12 million, bringing the total transaction value to $272 million. The off-market transaction was funded with cash on hand, including approximately $85 million of proceeds through the company's ATM program, and $150 million of borrowings on its revolving line of credit. The acquisition is accretive to Macerich's Path Forward P

title: K2 Insurance Services Expands Small Commercial Market Offerings With Acquisition Of Oculus Underwriters
summary:
K2 Insurance Services, the Warburg Pincus-backed insurance services holding company, has announced the acquisition of Oculus Underwriters, a specialized underwriting management program focused on delivering tailored insurance solutions for the small commercial market. Following the acquisition, Oculus Underwriters will operate under Vikco Insurance Services, a premier brand within the K2 portfolio. Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
The post K2 Insurance Services Expands Small Commercial Market Offerings With Acquisition Of Oculus Underwriters appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Humankind Acquires The Mintable To Strengthen Leadership Training Capabilities
summary:
Humankind, the organizational design and leadership consultancy, has acquired The Mintable, an Australia-based leadership training platform backed by Blackbird Ventures. The Mintable is trusted by a range of high-growth companies including Tracksuit, Sharesies, LION and Notion. Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
The post Humankind Acquires The Mintable To Strengthen Leadership Training Capabilities appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Seaga Manufacturing Acquires Three Square Market
summary:
Seaga Manufacturing, a global leader in automated retail and intelligent inventory control solutions, has announced the acquisition of Three Square Market, one of the most recognized innovators in the micromarket segment of the convenience services industry. The deal strengthens Seaga's capabilities in micromarkets and expands its integrated vending ecosystem, combining Three Square Market's industry-leading micromarket kiosks, software platforms, secure payment technology, and market design and build services with Seaga's existing automated retail portfolio.
The post Seaga Manufacturing Acqui

title: Abry Private Debt Acquires $330 Million Private Credit Portfolio In Partnership With Coller Capital
summary: Abry Private Debt, the private credit strategy of Abry Partners, has announced the closing of its acquisition of a $330 million diversified private credit portfolio, completed in partnership with Coller Capital, a leading secondaries platform. The portfolio is highly diversified, consisting primarily of first-lien, senior-secured loans across commercial and professional services, healthcare, and consumer discretionary, with all underlying investments backed by established private equity sponsors. Abry will assume an active management role, working directly with sponsors, lenders, and managemen

title: 365 Retail Markets Completes Acquisition Of Cantaloupe
summary: 365 Retail Markets, a leading innovator in unattended retail technologies and portfolio company of Providence Equity Partners, has completed its acquisition of Cantaloupe, a global technology leader offering end-to-end solutions for self-service commerce. The combined business will operate under the 365 Retail Markets name, bringing together Cantaloupe's payments, telemetry, and global device network with 365's self-checkout, smart store, and software systems. The combination expands the range of environments 365 can serve, from traditional vending and food service operations to hospitality, e

title: Meatly Raises £10.4 Million Series A To Build Europe’s Largest Cultivated Meat Facility
summary:
Meatly, Europe's first company to sell cultivated meat, has raised £10.4 million in Series A funding to build Europe's largest cultivated meat production facility. The round was led by three European VC funds — Oyster Bay Venture Capital, Clean Growth Fund and JamJar Investments — joining existing investors Agronomics and Pets at Home. The latest raise brings Meatly's total funding to date to £17.4 million, building on £7 million in seed funding from founding investor Agronomics.

title: Lyrie Completes $2 Million Pre-Seed Round To Build Security Layer For The AI Agent Era
summary:
Lyrie.ai, the autonomous cybersecurity platform developed by OTT Cybersecurity LLC, has completed a $2 million pre-seed funding round and officially exited stealth. The raise will support continued platform development, security research team expansion, and the operationalization of the Agent Trust Protocol across Lyrie's platform and partner ecosystem. The company is headquartered in Dubai, UAE, and is already preparing a Series A round to scale deployment across enterprise and government markets.
The post Lyrie Completes $2 Million Pre-Seed Round To Build Security Layer For The AI Agent Era

title: Espa Launches AI-Powered Executive Assistant For Founders, Executives, And Families Without The Cost Barrier
summary: Deon Nicholas, founder of Forethought, has announced the public launch of Espa, an AI-native executive assistant built to manage the logistics of work and personal life in one place. Espa is backed by angel investors spanning tech, entertainment, and business, including Henry Shi of Anthropic, Adam D'Angelo of Quora, Tekedra Mawakana of Waymo, Scott Wu of Cognition, Anu Bharadwaj of Atlassian, and LL COOL J, as well as institutional investors Axiom Partners, Village Global, Neo, SV Angel, Zapier, and Harlem Capital. title: Antier Solutions Secures $3 Million To Scale Enterprise Blockchain Infrastructure
summary:
Antier Solutions, an enterprise blockchain engineering firm headquartered in Mohali, India, has secured $3 million in its first institutional funding round, led by GVFL, India's pioneer venture capital firm.
The post Antier Solutions Secures $3 Million To Scale Enterprise Blockchain Infrastructure appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Apollo Funds To Acquire Emerald And Questex To Create Leading North American B2B Events Platform
summary: Apollo-managed funds have entered into separate definitive agreements to acquire Emerald Holding and Questex with the intention of combining the two businesses into a leading North American B2B experiential events and media platform in an all-cash transaction. Under the terms of the agreement with Emerald, stockholders will receive $5.03 per share in cash, representing a 42.1% premium to Emerald's unaffected share price and implying an estimated closing enterprise value of approximately $1.5 billion.
